title: Crispy Garlic Paella
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make paella dish, perfect for a weeknight meal. This recipe combines the crunch of crispy garlic with the savory taste of traditional paella.
instructions: Cook the paella according to the package instructions.
In a large pan, heat some oil and add the crispy garlic. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the rice to the pan and stir well. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the garlicky flavor to the pan and stir well.
Add 2 cups of water to the pan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes.
Stir the paella occasionally to prevent burning.
